sessions.intent: Write foundational PLang website documentation — Getting Started guide and Module Reference for all 16 Runtime2 modules

before.assumptions: Runtime2 modules are stable with 83 handlers across 16 modules. Existing Documentation/ folder has v1 module docs that are outdated. No docs/ folder exists yet.
before.risk: PLang syntax examples may not match builder behavior exactly since they are written by hand, not tested through the builder.

sessions.plan: Phase 1: Write 5 Getting Started pages (index, installation, hello-world, how-it-works, folder-structure). Phase 2: Write 17 Module Reference pages (index + 16 modules) with parameter tables, PLang examples, and error keys sourced from actual handler code.

actions.context: Getting Started section — sourced from existing Documentation/Install.md, Documentation/GetStarted.md, and Runtime2 architecture docs
Module Reference — all parameter names, types, defaults, and error keys sourced from reading all 83 handler .cs files in PLang/Runtime2/modules/

after.notes: 22 docs written. Next: Language guide, Guides section, Reference section. All examples should be verified against builder.
